# INPersonHandleType.unknown

**Case**

An unknown type of data. Use this type if the identifier data is unique to your app.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Constants

- **INPersonHandleType.emailAddress**: An email address.
- **INPersonHandleType.phoneNumber**: A phone number.
